description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts-alpine Docker image and defining the stages test, dependencies, build, and publish. In the test stage add a code quality job that runs npm ci, npm install --save-dev eslint eslint-formatter-gitlab, and npm run lint -- --format gitlab ., and always uploads gl-codequality.json as a codequality artifact. Also in the test stage add a test & coverage job that runs npm ci, npm i -D jest-junit, and npm test -- --ci --reporters=default --reporters=jest-junit, always publishes junit.xml as a JUnit artifact and extracts coverage using the regex /All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/. In the dependencies stage add an outdated job that runs npm outdated and is allowed to fail, and a security scan job that runs npm i -g npm and npm audit --production and must not fail. In the build stage add a rollup build job that runs npm ci and npm run build, storing the dist directory as an artifact for 4 weeks, and a package job that runs npm pack, storing the generated *.tgz files as artifacts and only runs on tags. Finally, in the publish stage add a publish on npm job that needs the package and rollup build jobs, runs only on tags and triggers, writes an .npmrc file containing the NPM_TOKEN secret, runs npm publish, and sets the environment name npm with the URL https://www.npmjs.com/package/@formschema/native.
